generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how overblown civil defense programs drain resources from real national security. We need to focus on proven deterrence strategies, not waste money on unnecessary preparedness measures that only create unnecessary panic. Our allies are counting on us to stay strong, not get distracted by fearmongering. #NationalSecurityFirst #SmartDefense
